summary: Survikas is a static frontend prototype of a community-driven music platform. The UI demonstrates discovery (featured artists and trending tracks), artist profile pages, competitions with leaderboards, an upload flow (disabled/static), a user profile with track playback, and a rewards/achievements section. The codebase also contains ICP/DFINITY-oriented hooks for Internet Identity authentication and actor creation, plus Motoko modules for blob-storage maintenance/authorization, though the main backend canister is intentionally empty for the prototype.

existing_features.title: Client-side routing with multi-page navigation
existing_features.description: Defines routes for Discover/Home, Competitions, Upload, Profile, Rewards, and Artist Profile (parameterized by artistId) using TanStack Router. Navigation is driven via useNavigate and route definitions in App.tsx.

existing_features.title: Global application layout with responsive header and mobile bottom nav
existing_features.description: Provides a consistent UI frame with a sticky header, desktop navigation buttons, a mobile bottom navigation bar, and a footer. Highlights the active route using router state.

existing_features.title: Theme system and dark mode support
existing_features.description: Implements class-based theming via ThemeProvider and Tailwind CSS variables (OKLCH-based palettes) to support light/dark modes and consistent styling across the UI.

existing_features.title: Discover/Home page with hero, featured artists, and trending tracks
existing_features.description: Displays a hero banner with primary calls-to-action, a grid of featured artists (clickable cards navigating to artist profiles), and a grid of trending track cards with hover play/like UI elements.

existing_features.title: Artist profile page with popular tracks and stats
existing_features.description: Shows artist header (avatar, genre badge, follower count, bio), a popular tracks list with hover play UI, and computed stats including track count, total plays, and followers. Handles missing artist IDs with a fallback screen.

existing_features.title: Competitions page with active competitions, leaderboard, and rules
existing_features.description: Renders active competition cards (category, status, prize, participants, deadline) with join buttons, a leaderboard table with rank and trend indicators, and a 'How It Works' section describing the process.

existing_features.title: Upload page UI with guidelines, track metadata form, and tips (static)
existing_features.description: Provides a comprehensive upload form UI (audio file, cover art, title, description, genre, competition selection, tags) plus guidelines and tips; inputs and actions are disabled to reflect static prototype behavior.

existing_features.title: User profile page with tabs (tracks, following, followers)
existing_features.description: Displays profile header information and stats, plus a tabbed interface showing: (1) user tracks using the AudioPlayer component, (2) following list with unfollow UI, and (3) followers list with follow-back UI.

existing_features.title: Audio playback component with seek and fallback source handling
existing_features.description: Reusable AudioPlayer component supports play/pause, time display, seeking with a range input, metadata duration handling, graceful 'no preview' state, and automatic fallback audio source on load/playback error.

existing_features.title: Rewards and achievements UI (points, badges, redemption, activity)
existing_features.description: Shows points balance with milestone progress, quick stats, achievement badges with earned/progress states, a redeemable rewards catalog with affordability gating, and a transaction/activity feed.

existing_features.title: Internet Identity authentication context (login/logout + persistence)
existing_features.description: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider using @dfinity/auth-client that initializes from stored sessions, exposes login/logout methods, tracks login status, and keeps the current Identity in React context.

existing_features.title: ICP canister actor creation hook with React Query caching
existing_features.description: Creates an authenticated or anonymous canister actor based on the current Internet Identity, caches it with React Query (keyed by principal), and invalidates/refetches dependent queries when the actor changes.

existing_features.title: Motoko blob-storage maintenance utilities (authorization, GC, cashier top-ups)
existing_features.description: Implements storage helper modules: loads a cashier principal from an environment variable, refreshes authorized gateway principals via a cashier canister call, checks authorization, tops up the cashier with available cycles, lists dead blobs for deletion, confirms deletion and triggers GC, and returns a simple upload certificate payload.

existing_features.title: Backend canister placeholder
existing_features.description: Defines an intentionally empty main backend actor, consistent with the app being a static-only prototype without backend logic.

existing_features.title: ICP-focused build/deploy template scaffolding (frontend + backend)
existing_features.description: Adds/updates a reusable build-template setup including Dockerfile, deploy script, canister.yaml definitions for frontend/backend, workspace/package configuration, and helper scripts (e.g., image resize/pruning) to standardize building and deploying the prototype for ICP environments.

existing_features.title: Frontend lint rules for ICP/Internet Identity integration
existing_features.description: Introduces custom ESLint rules to enforce InternetIdentityProvider usage patterns and to prevent problematic BigInt values in React Query keys, aligning frontend code quality with ICP integration constraints.

existing_features.title: Add playable audio sources to the existing mock track data so that at least the Home page trending tracks and Artist profile popular tracks have `audioSrc` values that point to audio files in `frontend/public/assets/` (e.g., `.mp3`).

Make the Play buttons on track cards actually start playback: when a user clicks the Play overlay on a Home page trending track card or an Artist profile track row, the UI must open an audio playback UI using the existing `frontend/src/components/AudioPlayer.tsx` component and start playing the selected track’s `audioSrc` when available.
Ensure only one track plays at a time across the app: starting playback for a new track must stop/pause any currently playing track opened from these track lists.

new_feature_requests.summary: Enable playable audio for songs/tracks in the UI prototype (user can play their songs from track cards/players).

architecturalNotes: React SPA using TanStack Router for client-side routing (routes: home, competitions, upload, profile, rewards, artist profile).
App-wide layout wrapper (header + desktop nav, mobile bottom nav, footer) implemented as the root route component with <Outlet /> for nested routes.
Tailwind CSS with CSS variable (OKLCH) theming; dark mode handled via next-themes (ThemeProvider with class-based toggling).
UI composed primarily of shadcn-style components (Card, Button, Badge, Tabs, Table, Avatar, Progress, Alert) with lucide-react icons.
Static prototype data model: pages render from hard-coded arrays/records (artists, tracks, competitions, leaderboard, rewards, etc.).
React Query is set up globally (QueryClientProvider). A custom useActor hook uses React Query to memoize an ICP canister actor per identity and forces dependent query refresh on identity changes.
Internet Identity integration is encapsulated in a context provider hook (InternetIdentityProvider) that loads persisted identity and exposes login/logout state.

Backend includes a Motoko 'mixin' module pattern for adding blob-storage maintenance endpoints (authorization list refresh, dead blob pruning, cashier cycle top-ups) using env-var configuration and system primitives.
Repository now includes a build-template scaffold (workspace configs, Dockerfile, deploy.sh, icp.yaml, canister.yaml files) to standardize packaging and deployment for ICP.
Frontend adds custom ESLint rules focused on ICP constraints (e.g., prohibiting BigInt in React Query keys; enforcing InternetIdentityProvider usage).
knownIssues: Prototype is largely static: no real backend integration for discovery, competitions, follow/unfollow, likes, sharing, uploads, rewards redemption, or leaderboards (most buttons are non-functional UI only).
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts is an intentionally empty placeholder, indicating missing data-fetching layer for real integration.
Upload page form is fully disabled (intended as a UI mock).
Backend main.mo is intentionally empty; any real application logic is not implemented.
Duplicate/competing global stylesheet files exist (frontend/src/index.css and frontend/index.css) with different variable sets; only one is likely intended, but this can confuse maintenance.
Artist total-plays calculation in ArtistProfilePage parses play counts assuming an 'M' suffix; other formats (e.g., 'K') would be incorrect.
AudioPlayer toggles play state optimistically without awaiting/handling the promise from audio.play(); playback failures could desync UI state from actual audio state.

Motoko Storage.isAuthorized uses 'registry.authorizedPrincipals.find(...)' as if arrays have a .find method; depending on the Motoko core library version, this may not compile and may need Array.find.
Motoko refillCashier subtracts a reserved cycle amount using Nat.sub; if balance is below the reserve, this can trap.
